ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the drug */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the drug was approved */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "clinical_trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the drug in clinical trials (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2, Approved) */,
  "drug_category" TEXT /* Category of the drug (e.g., anti-inflammatory, antiviral) */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Form in which the drug is available (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "atc_code" TEXT /* Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical Classification System code for the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects associated with the drug */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Conditions under which the drug should not be used */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions for the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the disease */,
  "first_documented" TEXT /* Date the disease was first documented */,
  "etiology" TEXT /* The cause or causes of the disease */,
  "pathophysiology" TEXT /* The functional changes associated with the disease */,
  "diagnosis_methods" TEXT /* Common methods used to diagnose the disease */,
  "prognosis" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the disease */,
  "prevention_methods" TEXT /* Ways to prevent the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_disease_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "drug_id" TEXT /* ID of the drug */,
  "disease_id" TEXT /* ID of the disease */,
  "predict_score" REAL /* Predicted score indicating the likelihood of the drug being effective for the disease */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Range within which the true efficacy score is likely to fall */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of data used for the prediction (e.g., clinical trials, in vitro studies) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_disease_predictions_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_disease_predictions_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "drug_id" TEXT /* ID of the drug being tested */,
  "trial_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the clinical trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the clinical trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clinical trial (e.g., Ongoing, Completed, Terminated) */,
  "lead_institution" TEXT /* Lead institution conducting the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., efficacy, safety) */,
  "patient_population" TEXT /* Specific patient population targeted in the trial */,
  "outcome_measures" TEXT /* Primary and secondary outcome measures of the trial */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the trial */,
  "trial_results" TEXT /* Summary of the trial results */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Whether the trial results have been published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research reference */,
  "drug_id" TEXT /* ID of the drug (if applicable) */,
  "disease_id" TEXT /* ID of the disease (if applicable) */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the publication was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_references_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_references_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "drug_id" TEXT /* ID of the drug */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Solubility, Bioavailability) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property information (e.g., manufacturer, research study) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the property information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_properties_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "disease_id" TEXT /* ID of the disease */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Symptom, Treatment) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property information (e.g., medical literature, patient data) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the property information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_properties_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prediction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES drug_disease_predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_disease_indications" (
  "indication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indication */,
  "drug_id" TEXT /* ID of the drug */,
  "disease_id" TEXT /* ID of the disease */,
  "indication_date" TEXT /* Date the indication was recorded */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the indication (e.g., Approved, Under Review) */,
  "indication_type" TEXT /* Type of indication (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "indication_source" TEXT /* Source of the indication (e.g., clinical trial, expert opinion) */,
  "indication_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the indication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_disease_indications_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_disease_indications_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)
